title: nageia totara
intro: Nageia totara, also known as the New Zealand totara, is a coniferous tree native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Podocarpaceae. Its bark and wood have been traditionally used in Maori medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nageia totara include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Nageia totara is often used in the form of a bark infusion or decoction, which can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
